response:
To compute the **sample variance** of the data set:

$$
\{-18, 7, 8, 7, -17, 13, 13, 21, -9\}
$$

---

### Step 1: Find the mean (average) of the data set

$$
\text{Mean} = \frac{-18 + 7 + 8 + 7 + (-17) + 13 + 13 + 21 + (-9)}{9}
$$

$$
= \frac{-18 + 7 + 8 + 7 - 17 + 13 + 13 + 21 - 9}{9}
$$

$$
= \frac{(-18 - 17 - 9) + (7 + 8 + 7 + 13 + 13 + 21)}{9}
$$

$$
= \frac{-44 + 67}{9} = \frac{23}{9} \approx 2.5556
$$

---

### Step 2: Compute the squared differences from the mean

We will compute $(x_i - \bar{x})^2$ for each data point:

$$
\begin{align*}
(-18 - \frac{23}{9})^2 &= \left(-\frac{155}{9}\right)^2 = \frac{24025}{81} \\
7 - \frac{23}{9} &= \frac{44}{9} \Rightarrow \left(\frac{44}{9}\right)^2 = \frac{1936}{81} \\
8 - \frac{23}{9} &= \frac{55}{9} \Rightarrow \left(\frac{55}{9}\right)^2 = \frac{3025}{81} \\
7 - \frac{23}{9} &= \frac{44}{9} \Rightarrow \left(\frac{44}{9}\right)^2 = \frac{1936}{81} \\
